016package org.consensusj.bitcoinj.signing;
017
018import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
019import org.bitcoinj.core.Transaction;
020import org.bitcoinj.core.TransactionInput;
021import org.bitcoinj.script.Script;
022import org.bitcoinj.script.ScriptBuilder;
023import org.bitcoinj.script.ScriptException;
024
025/**
026 * Utility for transaction validation
027 */
028public class TransactionVerification {
029    /**
030     * Verify that a transaction correctly spends the input specified by index. Throws {@link ScriptException}
031     * if verification fails.
032     *
033     * @param tx The transaction to verify
034     * @param inputIndex The input to verify
035     * @param fromAddr The address we are trying to spend funds from
036     * @throws ScriptException If {@code scriptSig#correctlySpends} fails with exception
037     */
038    public static void correctlySpendsInput(Transaction tx, int inputIndex, Address fromAddr) throws ScriptException {
039        correctlySpendsInput(tx, inputIndex, ScriptBuilder.createOutputScript(fromAddr));
040    }
041
042    /**
043     * Verify that a transaction correctly spends the input specified by index. Throws {@link ScriptException}
044     * if verification fails.
045     *
046     * @param tx The transaction to verify
047     * @param inputIndex The input to verify
048     * @param scriptPubKey The script we are trying to spend
049     * @throws ScriptException If {@code scriptSig#correctlySpends} fails with exception
050     */
051    public static void correctlySpendsInput(Transaction tx, int inputIndex, Script scriptPubKey) throws ScriptException {
052        TransactionInput input = tx.getInputs().get(inputIndex);
053        input.getScriptSig()
054                    .correctlySpends(tx, inputIndex, input.getWitness(), input.getValue(), scriptPubKey, Script.ALL_VERIFY_FLAGS);
055    }
056}
